KOMEIJIKOISHI-UNCONSCIOUS.title: Unconscious
KOMEIJIKOISHI-UNCONSCIOUS.description: Cards with this tag can be played by unconscious effects.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-BLOOM.title: Bloom
KOMEIJIKOISHI-BLOOM.description: When you play an Attack, deal extra damage equal to that card's damage to a random enemy. [gold]Block[/gold] you gain is reduced by 60%. Gain energy when entering this stance.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-CLOSED.title: Closed
KOMEIJIKOISHI-CLOSED.description: [gold]Block[/gold] you gain is increased by 20%. Draw 1 card when entering this stance.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-DANMAKU.title: Danmaku
KOMEIJIKOISHI-STANCE.title: Stance
KOMEIJIKOISHI-STANCE.description: [blue]Closed[/blue] and [red]Bloom[/red] stances have special effects when entered.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-FUMO.title: Fumo
KOMEIJIKOISHI-FUMO.description: Rulers of the world with mysterious powers.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-LOST_IN_FLOWER_FIELD.title: Lost in the Flower Field
KOMEIJIKOISHI-LOST_IN_FLOWER_FIELD.descr: [green]Koishi[/green] is on an adventure. The flower field is [purple]purple[/purple], [blue]blue[/blue], and [red]red[/red]. Relax. [thinky_dots]Empty your head[/thinky_dots].
